meaning: 1. traditional form of Chinese, as opposed to simplified form 簡體|简体[ji
sentence: 香港和台湾使用的是繁体字。
pinyin: Xiānggǎng hé Táiwān shǐyòng de shì fántǐzì.
english: Hong Kong and Taiwan use traditional Chinese characters.

sentence: 这家餐厅的海产非常新鲜。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de hǎichǎn fēicháng xīnxiān.
english: The seafood at this restaurant is very fresh.

sentence: 这个月油价浮动比较大。
pinyin: Zhège yuè yóujià fúdòng bǐjiào dà.
english: Oil prices have fluctuated quite a lot this month.

sentence: 妈妈在阳台上种了几盆兰花。
pinyin: Māma zài yángtái shàng zhòng le jǐ pén lánhuā.
english: Mom planted several pots of orchids on the balcony.

sentence: 记者从总社发回了最新报道。
pinyin: Jìzhě cóng zǒngshè fā huí le zuìxīn bàodào.
english: The reporter sent back the latest report from the head office.
